name: Monster Cookies
directions: Mix ingredients in order given.
Drop by teaspoonful on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: In a very large bowl, cream margarine and sugars.
Add eggs and mix until fluffy.
Stir in corn syrup and peanut butter.
Add flour and soda.
Add oatmeal and mix well.
Stir in remaining ingredients.
Using an ice cream scoop, drop onto greased cookie sheet, not more than 6 per sheet.
Bake at 325° for 13 minutes.

name: Everything Cookies Aka Monster Cookies
directions: In very large bowl, use mixer to combine first seven ingredients--eggs through peanut butter.
Add oatmeal, candy, and chocolate chips and mix thoroughly by hand.
If dough is too sticky, either refrigerate or add another 1/2 to 1 cup oatmeal.
Scoop ice cream size balls of dough onto cookie sheets, with plenty of space in between.
Bake at 350° for 13-15 minutes.  If using two racks, switch top to bottom and bottom to top about halfway through.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Mix all ingredients well in a VERY large bowl.
Smarties may be mixed in, or added on top before baking.
Drop by tablespoons on cookie sheets.
Press down with a fork.
Bake 350° 10-12 minutes.
Do not overbake.

name: Chocolate Chip Monster Cookies
directions: Heat oven to 375.
In food processor or blender, grind cereal unti fine.
Add 1/2 cup milk chocolate chips; blend until mixture is as fine as possible.
In a large bowl, cream butter and sugars.
Add eggs and vanilla.
In a seperate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Work crushed cereal into the mixture.
Add remaining milk chocolate chips.
Drop by tablespoonfuls onto lightly greased baking sheet.
Bake for 10 - 12 minutes or until done but still moist.
Remove from baking sheets and cool on wire rack.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Mix in order given --
drop by 1/4 cup full on ungreased cookie sheet --
flatten slightly --
bake at 350* for 12-14 minutes.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine margarine and peanut butter.
Add sugar, egg, egg white and vanilla extract.
Beat until smooth.
Add oats, baking soda, salt, chocolate chips and chocolate M & M pieces.
Mix well.
Drop spoonfuls of dough about 2" apart on baking sheet.
Bake 15 to 17 minutes, until golden.
Let cool a few minutes on sheet before removing to rack.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Cream butter, sugar, and brown sugar.  Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Add peanut butter, light corn syrup, and vanilla till well blended.
In another bowl, mix oats, baking soda, and salt together.
Add oat mixture to creamed mixture with a wooden spoon.
Stir in chocolate chips and M&Ms plain chocolate candy.
Roll dough into 2 inch balls.  Place on ungreased cookie sheet 3 inches apart.  Flatten slightly with a fork.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes in the preheated oven. Cool on cookie sheets for 10 minutes, before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.

name: Monster  Chocolate Chip Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Spray cookie sheets with baking spray.
toast pecans in oven or in saucepan over medium heat.
cream shortening, butter, and sugars.
add eggs and vanilla.
combine dry ingredients (3-1/2 cups flour, salt, and baking soda). Add them to the creamed mixture and stir well.
Stir in toasted pecans and chocolate chips.
Dip a 1/4 cup baking scoop into a bowl of extra flour, tap excess flour off the scoop (this will prevent dough from sticking to the scoop, redip in flour as needed).
drop cookie dough by 1/4 cupfuls onto greased cookie sheet at least 2 inches apart.
bake 13-15 minutes (13 for chewier cookie, 15 for crisper cookie).
cool on cookie sheet for about 5 minutes before removing from the baking sheet.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
In a very large bowl or a dishpan, cream together butter and peanut butter. Add brown and granulated sugars, corn syrup, vanilla, baking soda, eggs, chocolate chips, M&M's, and oatmeal.
Use an ice cream scoop or a 1/4-cup measure to dip out dough. Flatten cookies on ungreased baking sheet, leaving ample room for spreading - place 8 on large cookie sheet or 6 on a jellyroll pan.
Bake about 15 minutes, depending on size. After cooking a minute or two, carefully remove to wire rack to cool completely. Decorate, if desired.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Cream together first 7 ingredients.
Then mix well with the next 3 ingredients.
Add oatmeal and mix.
Bake on greased cookie sheet at 350°F for 10 -12 minutes.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat the oven to 350.
Combine the butter and peanut butter until smooth.
Add brown sugar, eggs, egg whites and vanilla.
Beat until smooth.
Add oats, baking soda, and salt.
Hand mix in chocolate chips and M&Ms.
Drop spoonsfuls of dough at least 2 inches apart on cookie sheet.
Bake for 15-17 minutes or until golden.
Let cool for a few minutes on sheet and then put on wire rack to cool.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Cream the butter, brown sugar and sugar together with mixer.
add eggs (one at a time), peanut butter, corn syrup, and vanilla. mix until well blended.
add baking soda.
add in rolled oats on cup at a time, making sure they are well belended before adding next.  You may fine you do not need all that you have on hand.
Finally add in all the good stuff - M&M's and chocolate chips.
Using 1/4 cup measuring scoop - I said they were big - drop onto greased baking sheet. no need to flatten.
Bake at 350 for 12 to 15 minutes.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Cream together sugars, butter.
Add vamilla, corn syrup, and soda into mixture.
Beat eggs and stir into mixture.
Stir in oatmeal and peanut butter.
Add chocolate chips and M&Ms.
Drop with an ice cream scoop on a greased cookie sheet. Bake ten to twelve minutes @ 350* .
There is no flour in these cookies.
Variation: Double everything. Makes a large batch.

name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Monster Cookies
directions: mix well in a very large bowl. put on cookie sheet and bake for 15 minutes on 350 degrees.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cream together eggs, sugars, vanilla, corn syrup and baking soda in a large mixing bowl.
Beat into the egg mixture remaining ingredient until everything is well blended.
Refrigerate dough for 30 minutes and then drop onto a cookie sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Cream butter and sugar.
Add eggs, orange juice, and vanilla. Mix well.
Stir in crunchy peanut butter.
Add dry ingredients and mix again.
This system pretty much works just as well if you dump everything together into a large bowl and stir.
Drop onto a cookie sheet.

name: Melissa's Monster Cookies =)
directions: In large bowl, combine sugars, eggs, butter, corn syrup, vanilla, soda, and peanut butter.
Fold in oats and M&M candies.
Drop 2 T of dough on ungreased cookie sheet 3" apart.
Bake 8-10 minutes at 350 degrees.
Cool completely before removing from cookie sheet. Cookies will be soft and will firm while cooling.
Store in air tight container.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or nonstick baking mats.

In a very large mixing bowl, combine the eggs and sugars. Mix well. Add the salt, vanilla, peanut butter, and butter. Mix well. Stir in the chocolate candies, chocolate chips, raisins, if using, baking soda, and oatmeal. Drop by tablespoons 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes. Do not overbake. Let stand for about 3 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool. When cool, store in large resealable plastic bags.

name: Flourless Monster Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Line two baking sheets with parchment paper or silpats.
Cream butter, peanut butter and sugars together in mixer (about 3 minutes).
In a large bowl, toss oats, cinnamon and baking soda together.
Add eggs to butter & sugar mixture one at a time. Make sure the eggs are mixed in well. Add vanilla and salt. Mix to combine.
Add the oat mixture to the bowl and then slowly add the "stuff" and mix until it is incorporated. No need to worry about over-mixing because there is no flour.

Using a small ice cream scoop or spoon, scoop the cookie dough onto the lined baking sheets. Space them about two inches apart. Flatten the tops a bit with the bottom of a glass. Sprinkle with fleur de sel if you wish.
Bake for 10 minutes - turning halfway through the baking time. Cool on a rack but sneak at least one while they are warm.

name: Monster Marshmallow Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Line 2 baking pans with parchment paper.

Combine the flour, baking powder and baking soda in a large bowl.  In a separate bowl beat the butter and both sugars with a mixer on medium high speed until fluffy.  Beat in the eggs one at a time on medium speed, then beat in the vanilla.  Add the flour mixture and beat on low until combined.

Stir in the oats, 1 cup each of chocolate chips, pecans and marshmallows into the dough with a wooden spoon.  Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of the dough onto the prepared baking sheets about 3" apart.  Bake the cookies in batches until golden, 10-12 minutes.  Transfer to racks to cool.

To make topping - Combine the remaining chocolate chips and marshallows, half and half and cayenne pepper in a saucepan over medium heat; cook, stirring until the mixture is smooth, about 5 minutes.  Remove from heat.  Stir in the remaining pecans.  Drizzle mixture over the cookies and let set, about 4 hours.

name: Monster Cookies
directions: Combine ingredients in order.
Mix thoroughly
Use ice cream scoop, place on greased cookie sheet, flattened.
Bake 12 – 15 minutes at 350 degrees.
Cool cookies on sheet before removing.

name: Peanut Butter Monster Cookies
directions: HEAT oven to 350ºF. Beat shortening, sugar, brown sugar and vanilla extract in large bowl on medium speed of electric mixer until light and  fluffy. Add peanut butter, eggs and water; mix well.

COMBINE flour, baking soda and salt in large bowl. Stir in oats. Gradually add to peanut butter mixture until well blended. Stir in chocolate chips. candy coated chocolate pieces and coconut. Cover and chill 30 minutes.

DROP by heaping tablespoonfuls, 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets. Flatten to 2-inch circles. Bake 10 to 12 minutes or until light brown around edges. Cool 2 minutes before removing to wire rack to cool completely.

VARIATION JUMBO PEANUT BUTTER MONSTER COOKIES:  Prepare cookie dough as directed above. Drop by 1/4-cupfuls, 3 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets. Flatten to 3-inch circles. Bake 13 to 15 minutes or until light brown around edges. Makes 1 1/2 dozen.

name: Monster Cookies Heapin' Helpin
directions: Mix in order given.  Bake at 350 for 12-15 minutes.  I make them big.  6 to a cookie sheet.

name: Monster Cookie
directions: Mix egg, sugar, peanut butter and soft butter until creamy.
Mix dry ingredients until combined.
Add dry ingredients and chips to wet ingredients. Mix until all are combined thoroughly.
Bake at 350 for 8-10 minutes.  Remove to cooling rack. Enjoy!
